description_long: This kiosk consists of a large, weathered metal smoker or grill mounted on a wheeled base, positioned beneath a tall, brightly colored sign that reads 'The Willows Market.' The sign is supported by a sturdy vertical post and features a green and white color scheme with bold, stylized lettering. The kiosk is set on a concrete pad and is flanked by a hedge, suggesting it is located outdoors, possibly in a market or roadside setting. The smoker unit has visible handles, a chimney, and a hatch, indicating its function as a food preparation or vending station. The overall structure appears robust and utilitarian, with a focus on functionality and visibility. The sign is the most visually prominent feature, drawing attention from a distance.
description: A metal smoker or grill kiosk with a large, colorful 'The Willows Market' sign mounted above, set on a concrete pad and flanked by greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smoker/grill, wheels, and the full 'The Willows Market' sign above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the smoker and the vertical support of the sign.
description_view_2: Rear view with the hedge more prominent and the back of the sign visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smoker's handles and the sign's edge.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign mounted above the kiosk, rectangular, with 'The Willows Market' in bold letters and a circular logo.
attribute_roof_design: No traditional roof; sign structure acts as overhead element, flat and rectangular.
attribute_architectural_style: Rustic utilitarian with market signage and industrial smoker elements.
